text: S3 Replication Considerations @ msiteancanitia @) socamar * Not retroactive & Versioning needs to be ON * One-way replication Source to Destination e Unencrypted, SSE-S3 & SSE-KMS (with extra config) e Source bucket owner needs permissions to objects * NO system events, Glacier or Glacier Deep Archive * NO DELETES
